notes: Measured from 272 FINAL 2025 regular-season games (ESPN scoreboard + summary boxscore, STATUS-gated). Ties excluded from winner/loser splits.

CAUSATION CAVEAT: full-game totals conflate cause and effect. Winners out-rushing losers mixes 'good running wins games' with 'leading teams kneel on the clock'. These are DESCRIPTIVE deltas, not causal effects.
Blowout = final margin >= 14; one-score = margin <= 8. rush_share = rushAtt / (rushAtt + passAtt).

garbage_time: teams trailing by >= 14 entering Q4 (from scoreboard linescores, periods 1-3). Q4 points only (OT excluded); q4_td_rate = share of those teams scoring >= 7 in Q4 (TD proxy, since linescores carry points, not scoring plays).

params.rush_lean_when_leading.value = mean winner-minus-loser rush-share gap; params.trailing_pass_boost.value = trailing team's Q4 points minus its own Q1-Q3 per-quarter pace. Both recorded at weight 0 / applied false; game probabilities are unchanged by this file.
Raw rows cached at data/fixtures/gamestats_2025.json; delete the cache to force a refetch.
